goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 10:30'.
The train should go to 'stevenage' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should be in the 'south'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 3'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave after 10:30
The train should go to stevenage and should leave on sunday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should be in the south
The hotel should have a star of 3
Make sure you get postcode and whether they have free parking
